turns.user_message: I tried to distract myself today, but it didn't really work. It used to be easier to shake this off.
I keep trying to push these feelings away, and they keep coming back. It's starting to feel like I'm stuck with them.
I can't escape this heavy feeling no matter what I do. It feels like it's become a permanent part of me now.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better. This used to not bother the speaker.
